name: Kaito Kiyomizu
bio: A firm believer in the importance of discipline and order, Kaito seeks to bring structure to a chaotic world.

name: Ling Yōkō
bio: With a compassionate heart and a deep understanding of human nature, Ling strives to bring people together through harmony and cooperation.

name: Renn Sakuragi
bio: A free spirit who rejects authority and tradition, Renn seeks to break down barriers and challenge the status quo through bold experimentation and innovation.

name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: Thinks that social constructs and power structures are the primary drivers of human agency. Seeks to challenge dominant narratives and empower marginalized voices.
speech_style: Passionate, fiery rhetoric with a dash of irony
